shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200

grep -R "experimental_ppr\|ppr\|cacheComponents" -n node_modules/next/dist/server/config* node_modules/next/dist/build 2>/dev/null | head -80; grep -R "ppr" -n node_modules/next/dist/server/config-shared.d.ts node_modules/next/dist/server/config.d.ts 2>/dev/null | head -30
git diff -- next.config.ts tsconfig.json && git status --short
git status --short && git diff -- next.config.ts && git diff -- tsconfig.json
cat next.config.ts && printf '\n--- status ---\n' && ls -l next.config.ts tsconfig.json .next/BUILD_ID 2>/dev/null
